title: poa palustris f. coarctata
intro: Poa palustris f. coarctata, also known as dwarf tussock grass, is a perennial grass species found in wetland areas, particularly in North America. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Poa palustris f. coarctata include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea, or using the plant in tincture or salve form to apply directly to affected areas.
